title: Christmas Chest Boats
description: A resource pack that makes chest boats have a Christmas chest texture, which is still not in the vanilla game.
body:
![Pale Oak Chest Boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a98c5ba54be74b0df2c188ab4f41489f83ba2752.png)
# Christmas Chest Boats
Using the Chrismas Chest texture, I retextured all chest boats, to have the chest match the theme.
